# Tata Neu Infinity Credit Card
  * 5% back as NeuCoins on Tata Neu and partner Tata Brand Spends
  * Additional 5% back as NeuCoins on selected Tata Neu Spends, post registering for Tata NeuPass
  * 1.5% back as NeuCoins on other Non-UPI spends


[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=TDCC&LGcode=MKTG "Apply Now")
![Tata Neu Infinity Credit Card](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/Tata-Neu-Infinity1?fmt=webp)
What's in store for you 
  * [Card Benefits & Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-hdfc-bank-credit-card#exclusive "Card Benefits & Features")
  * [Eligibility Criteria](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-hdfc-bank-credit-card#eligibility "Eligibility Criteria")
  * [Application Process](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-hdfc-bank-credit-card#e "Application Process")
  * [Card Management & Controls](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-hdfc-bank-credit-card#c "Card Management & Control")


![Protect Life](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-hdfc-bank-credit-card/_jcr_content/root/container/container_1791121385/box_container/item_1713193742099_c.coreimg.png/1753712714392/indianoil-card.png)
More benefits than ever before
Reward Benefits (Non-UPI)
  * 5% back as NeuCoins on Non-EMI Spends on Tata Neu and partner Tata Brands.
  * 1.5% back as NeuCoins on eligible Non-Tata Brand Spends and any Merchant EMI Spends
  * Earn additional 5% back as NeuCoins on selected categories on Tata Neu App/Website


Reward Benefits (UPI)
  * Earn up to 1.5% back as NeuCoins on eligible UPI spends


Lounge Access
  * **Domestic Lounge Access**
  * 2 Complimentary Domestic Lounge Voucher per calendar quarter (up to 8 per calendar year) can be availed on spends of Rs 50,000 or more in a calendar quarter.
  * **International Lounge Access**
  * 4 Complimentary Lounge Access per calendar year (1 per Quarter), outside India.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-hdfc-bank-credit-card#exclusive "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional benefits
### Reward Benefits (Non-UPI)
  * 5% back as NeuCoins on Non-EMI Spends on Tata Neu and partner Tata Brands. For list of eligible partner brands [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/tata-neu-plus-hdfc-bank-credit-card/pdfs/TATA_Neu_List_Brands.pdf)
  * 1.5% back as NeuCoins on Non-Tata Brand Spends and any Merchant EMI Spends
  * Earn additional 5% back as NeuCoins on selected categories on Tata Neu App/Website, post downloading Tata Neu App and registering for NeuPass. W.e.f 15-Jan-25 this benefit will be applicable for transactions done only via Primary Card Holder Mobile Number Account (as per credit card application) on Tata Neu using the Tata Neu HDFC Bank credit card [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-credit-card/pdf/tata-neu-pass-neucoins-tnc.pdf) for details.
  * For details on the NeuPass, please [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.tataneu.com/about-neupass.html)
  * Currently, Bill Payment (Tata Pay), Tanishq, Cult.fit, Air India, Tata Play spends are not eligible for additional 5% NeuCoins via NeuPass Membership
  * NeuCoins will not be accrued for Fuel, Wallet, Rental, Government and Online Gaming related transactions.
  * For detailed Terms and conditions and Fair Usage Policy [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-credit-card/pdf/tata_neu_infinity_card_tnc.pdf)
  * **Note:**  
With effect from 1st January 2023:  
1. NeuCoins earned on Grocery transactions will be capped to 2,000 per month for Tata Neu Infinity HDFC Bank Credit card.  
  
With effect from 1st September 2024:  
1. NeuCoins earned on Utility transactions will be capped at 2,000 NeuCoins per calendar month.  
2. NeuCoins earned on Telecom & Cable transactions will be capped at 2,000 NeuCoins per calendar month.  
3. Education payments made through third-party apps like (but not limited to) CRED, Cheq, MobiKwik, and others will NOT earn NeuCoins. However, education payments made directly through college/school websites or their POS machines will earn NeuCoins.  
  
With effect from 1st July 2025:  
1. No NeuCoins will be earned on Online Skill-Based Gaming transactions (MCC-5816)  
2. NeuCoins accrued for insurance transactions will have a maximum capping 2,000 per month instead of 2,000 per day.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Tata new infinity credit card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Reward Benefits (UPI)
  * W.e.f. 01-Aug-24, earn up to 1.5% back as NeuCoins on eligible UPI spends  
- Earn 0.50% back as NeuCoins on eligible UPI spends (including spends on partner Tata Brands), this will be posted to your card account by the Bank  
- Earn additional 1% back as NeuCoins on any eligible UPI payments by using Tata Neu UPI ID. Additional NeuCoins on Tata Neu UPI payments will be posted directly to your Tata Neu Account, for more details: [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-credit-card/pdf/additional-upi-neucoins-infinity.pdf).  
- Total NeuCoins earned on all UPI payments will be capped to 500 NeuCoins per calendar month  

  * NeuCoins will not be accrued for Fuel, Wallet, Rental, Government and Online Gaming related transactions.
  * For detailed Terms and conditions and Fair Usage Policy [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-credit-card/pdf/tata_neu_infinity_card_tnc.pdf)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Tata new infinity credit card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Lounge Access
**A. Domestic Lounge Access – VISA / RuPay Card**  

  * W.e.f 10-Jun-2025, Domestic Lounge Access benefit will be Milestone based and can be availed as a Lounge Voucher on spends of Rs 50,000 or more in a calendar quarter. Please note, you can access 2 Complimentary Domestic Lounge Voucher per calendar quarter (up to 8 per calendar year).  
[Click here​​​​​​​](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-credit-card/pdf/complimentary-domestic-airport-lounge-access-tata-neu-infinity.pdf) for the list of eligible domestic lounge access.
  * Upon qualifying for the benefit, you will receive SMS and Email, intimating you about the qualification. In case you have qualified for the benefit visit the link received in the SMS/Email, login using your Bank registered mobile number and claim your lounge voucher within 120 days of qualification. Once you have claimed the voucher, you can use the voucher in the eligible lounge list within 180 days of issuance of the voucher, for more details [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-credit-card/pdf/milestone_lounge_tataneu-cc.pdf).
  * To check the spends and qualification status in the current calendar quarter, from 10-Jun-2025 you can login into HDFC Bank Netbanking/Mobilebanking app > Go to Credit Card Section > Select Tata Neu HDFC Bank Credit Card > Click on Redeem Reward Points (you will be re-directed to Rewards Portal) > In Rewards Portal Go to MyReward > Spend Promo Details.
  * Note: - If your card is upgraded, lost, or reissued spends done on only new card will be considered. Spends done on previous card will not be considered for qualification.
**B. International Lounge Access – VISA Card**  

  * W.e.f 01-Jun-2025, Priority Pass on Tata Neu Infinity HDFC Bank Credit Card- VISA will be issued only basis request. In case you have been issued a new/ renewed/ replacement card, then you can apply for Priority Pass for self and add-on members by calling HDFC Bank phonebanking toll-free numbers [1800 1600](tel:18001600) or [1800 2600](tel:18002600) to enjoy the international lounge access as per the product feature benefit.
  * Using Priority Pass, you and your add on member can together avail up to 4 Complimentary Lounge Access per calendar year (1 per Quarter), outside India.
  * If you exceed the 4 Complimentary (1 per Quarter) visits, you will be charged at US $27 + GST per visit
  * All guests visits using Priority pass would be charged at US $27 + GST per visit per guest
  * Please note: Priority Pass in India will attract charges on your Credit Card. [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-credit-card/pdf/tata_neu_priority_pass.pdf) to know more. You can visit [www.prioritypass.com(opens in a new tab)](https://www.prioritypass.com/) for list of lounge details.
  * **To know about your lounge access history**
  * Please write a mail to pp@prioritypass.com.hk. Please provide name, complete 18 digit Priority Pass number and state that PP Membership is via HDFC Bank program. If there is more than 1 Priority Pass number (belonging to add-on PP holders), then please provide all the PP Numbers.
**C. International Lounge Access - RuPay**  

  * 4 Complimentary Lounge Access per calendar year (1 per Quarter), outside India. Customers will be charged a transaction fee of $3.25 on their Credit card towards complimentary lounge access, same shall be reversed. Visit exceeding the complimentary quota will be allowed at the discretion of lounge and will also be chargeable by the lounge.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.rupay.co.in/lounges) to check for list of RuPay International Lounges


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![Tata new infinity credit card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Welcome Benefits
  * Get 1,499 NeuCoins on Tata Neu App (as reversal of 1st Year Membership Fees), applicable on 1st Transaction done within 30 days of card issuance and will be available to claim inside Tata Neu App within 60 days of such transaction.
  * **Note:** For eligible customers, option to claim the Welcome Benefit will be available inside Tata Neu App for 180 days from statement date of the eligible transaction. The validity of the NeuCoins given against Welcome Benefit will be 365 days from the claim date.
  * Welcome Benefit is not applicable on Lifetime Free and First Year Free Cards. For detailed Terms and conditions [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-credit-card/pdf/tata_neu_infinity_card_tnc.pdf)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Insurance Benefits
  * Accidental air death cover worth ₹1 Crore
  * Emergency overseas hospitalization: up to ₹15 lakhs
  * Lost Card Liability Cover : Up to ₹9 lakhs
  * [Click Here](https://connect.hdfc.bank.in/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_NomineeDetails/Nominee.aspx) to update your nominee details.
  * [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-credit-card/pdf/tata_neu_infinity_insurance_tnc.pdf) for details.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Fuel Surcharge Waiver
  * 1% fuel surcharge waiver at all fuel stations across India  
(on minimum transaction of ₹400 & maximum transaction of ₹5,000. Maximum waiver of ₹500 per statement cycle)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-hdfc-bank-credit-card "View More")
![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Renewal Offer
  * Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in a year, before your Credit Card renewal date and get your renewal fee waived off.


![pd-benefit-feature-1](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible?
Salaried
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** 21 – 60 years
  * **Income (Monthly) -** ₹1,00,000


Self-Employed
  * **Nationality:** Indian
  * **Age:** 21 – 65 years
  * **Annual ITR >** ₹12,00,000


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Save up to ₹1,21,779 * annually 
Get extraordinary rewards with savings of more than a month on your spends......
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=TDCC&LGcode=MKTG "Apply Now")
![Millennia Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar card
  * Voter ID 
  * Driver's licence 
  * PAN card
  * Passport size photographs 


Address Proof
  * Aadhaar card 
  * Passport 
  * Utility bills (electricity, water, gas) 
  * Rental agreement 
  * Bank statement


Income Proof
  * Salary slips (recent) 
  * Form 16 
  * Income Tax Returns (ITR) 
  * Bank Statements 


## Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:
**Online application process:**
  * Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN
  * Step 2- Confirm your details
  * Step 3- Select your Card
  * Step 4- Submit & Receive your Card*


*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.
[Check Eligibility (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=TDCC&LGcode=MKTG "Check Eligibility")
![no data](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

  1. ### Card Control via MyCards

###  Card Control via MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/), a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of Tata Neu Infinity HDFC Bank Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up Card PIN 
  * Manage card controls like online spends, contactless transactions
  * View Transactions/Download e-statements
  * Block/Re-issue card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, manage, set PIN and card controls for Add-on card


  * Single Interface  
One unified platform for Credit Cards, Debit Cards, FASTag and Consumer Durable Loans
  * Spends tracking  
Simple interface to track all your spends


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Fees & Charges 
  * Joining/Renewal Membership Fee – ₹1,499/- + Applicable Taxes
  * Spend ₹3,00,000 or more in a year, before your Credit Card renewal date and get your renewal fee waived off.  
If applicable, the Joining Fees will be levied on 120th day of the card issuance and Renewal Fees will be levied every year at the start of every anniversary year.


Click [_here_(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf) to view details of the Fees and Charges **on Tata Neu Infinity HDFC Bank Credit Card**.
[Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/membership-kit/card-member-agreement-29-10-2019.pdf) **for Card Member Agreement**
Limited period Life Time Free Offer (applicable only for the applications applied via Bank’s digital platform & physical applications between 1st Oct’24 to 31st Dec’24)
  * Life Time Free offer on Tata Neu HDFC Bank Credit Cards is valid for cards applied from 1st Oct’24 to 31st Dec’24 via Bank’s digital platform & physical applications during the offer period.
  * LTF conversion will be done for all eligible customers within 90 days from card open date. 
  * This offer is NOT applicable for existing customers.
  * Life Time Free/First Year Free cardholders are not eligible for Welcome Benefit.
  * HDFC Bank reserves the right, at any time, without prior notice and without assigning any reason whatsoever, to add/alter/modify/change or vary all of these terms and conditions or to replace, wholly or in part, this offer by another offer, whether similar to this offer or not, or to extend or withdraw it altogether.


![Fees & Charges](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  NeuCoins Redemption 
You can use your NeuCoins for purchases on Tata Neu /Website for Brands like:
  * Air India Express
  * Bigbasket
  * Croma, Westside.
  * Tata CLiQ, Tata CLiQ Luxury
  * Hotel Bookings/Purchases on IHCL
  * TATA 1MG
  * Qmin
  * Titan and Tanishq (only via Tata Neu)


You can use your NeuCoins by selecting Tata Pay/ NeuCoins /Loyalty Redemption as the payment method.  
NeuCoins can only be used on eligible transactions as defined by the individual brands.  
For offline redemption of NeuCoins on selected stores kindly refer [FAQs](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-credit-card/pdf/tata_neu_infinity_card_faq.pdf)
Note:  
Your monthly statement will give breakup of NeuCoins as following:
  * NeuCoins accrued and available with the Bank
  * NeuCoins transferred to Tata Neu during the Statement Cycle


On periodic basis (within 7 working days of the statement generation) the NeuCoins will be transferred to Tata Neu by the Bank.  
NeuCoins transferred to Tata Neu will be available for redemption on Tata Neu App.
For detailed Terms and conditions [Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/tata-neu-infinity-credit-card/pdf/tata_neu_infinity_card_tnc.pdf)
![Key Image](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  NeuCoins Validity 
Starting 01-Aug-25, NeuCoins earned on your Tata Neu HDFC Bank Credit Card will have a validity of 12 months (including lock period) from the end of the month in which they're credited to your Tata Neu Account. Example: 
  * If NeuCoins are credited on 05-Aug-25, they will be valid until 31-Aug-26.
  * If NeuCoins are credited on 31-Aug-25, they will be valid until 31-Aug-26.


**Validity of Existing NeuCoins balance**
  * **Non-Promotional NeuCoins:** The validity of your existing balance of Non-Promotional NeuCoins (earned before 01-Aug-25) will be set as 31-Jul-26 in your Tata Neu Account, this activity will start from Jul’25 and will be completed by Aug’25 in a phased manner.
  * **Promotional NeuCoins/Welcome Benefit:** NeuCoins earned during special promotions or as Welcome Benefit will continue to follow the expiry terms communicated at the time of issuance.


For details on Redemption and Validity on NeuCoins, please [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.tataneu.com/about-neupass)
![NeuCoins Validity](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Additional Features 
**Interest-free Credit Period**
  * Get up to 50 days of interest-free Credit from the date of purchase. (subject to submission of the charge by the Merchant)


**Smart EMI**
  * Option to convert big spends into EMI after purchase available on Tata Neu Plus HDFC Bank Credit Card. ([Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi) to know more)


**Zero Cost Card Liability**
  * Available on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24-hour Call Centre.


![Additional Features](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Contactless Payment 
  * Tata Neu Infinity HDFC Bank Credit Card is enabled* for Contactless Payments at retail outlets.  
(Note: In India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction where you are not asked to input your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the Card holder must enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons. You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.)


![Contactless Payment](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Revolving Credit 
Available at a nominal interest rate on your Tata Neu Infinity HDFC Bank Credit Card. Please refer to Fees and Charges section to know more.
![Zero Cost Card Liability](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf) to view details of Fees and Charges/MITC on **Tata Neu Infinity HDFC Bank Credit Card.**
[Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/membership-kit/card-member-agreement-29-10-2019.pdf)**for Card Member Agreement**
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/cards/services) to access all important links related to your Credit Card.

###  Application Channels 
You can choose any of the following easy options to apply for your HDFC Bank Credit Card:
  * **1. Website  
**You can quickly apply online by clicking [here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=TDCC&Lgcode=MKTG&mc_id=website&icid=website#nbb).
  * **2. HDFC Bank Branch  
**Prefer a face-to-face interaction? Just visit your nearest [branch(opens in a new tab)](https://near-me.hdfcbank.com/branch-atm-locator/) and our staff will help you with the application.
